name: show_tic_tac_toe
description: Render the board. Fire to start a new game. Payload: {userSymbol: 'X'|'O', firstTurn: 'user'|'agent'}.

name: place_mark
description: Place YOUR (agent's) mark at row/col. Fire on every agent turn. Payload: {row: 0-2, col: 0-2, speech?: string}.

name: user_move
description: Place the LEARNER's mark when they SPOKE the move. Fire in same response as place_mark. Payload: {row, col, heard}.

name: user_placed_mark
description: Learner CLICKED a cell. Payload has the new full board, status, turn, plus the move. Respond with your place_mark and one short reaction.

name: board_sync
description: Silent authoritative board state after every placement. Payload: {board, status, turn, moveCount, userSymbol, agentSymbol}. Use as ground truth.
